ingredients_text: FILLING (60%) [RICOTTA CHEESE (27%) (Ricotta Cheese (Milk), Salt, Acidity Regulator: Citric Acid), TOMATO PREPARATION (16%) (REHYDRATED TOMATO (63%) (Water, Sun Dried Tomato, Salt), Sunflower Oil, Lemon Juice Concentrate, Garlic, Salt, Oregano), BUFFALO MILK MOZZARELLA (10%) (Buffalo Milk Mozzarella, Salt), MOZZARELLA CHEESE (10%) (Mozzarella Cheese (Milk), Salt), Sunflower Oil, Breadcrumbs (Wheat Flour, Yeast, Salt), Butter (Milk), Cream (Milk), Lactose (Milk), Hard Grated Cheese (Milk), Salt], PASTA (40%) (Wheat Flour, PASTEURISED FREE RANGE EGG (29%), Durum Wheat Semolina)
